caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two individuals engaged in conversation. On the left, a woman with red hair and a blue patterned top is listening attentively, while on the right, an older man with glasses and a beard, wearing a blue shirt, is speaking. The background of the woman's side includes green string lights, suggesting a cozy indoor setting, while the man's background features a blue wall with framed pictures and a thermostat. The overall tone seems serious and focused on the topic of climate change, as indicated by the title of the segment.
